utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 of these items are present. Each one includes the required details and cost information. Health_coverage specifies both physical and mental health insurance with costs; property_coverage includes home/contents insurance with coverage details and costs; travel_coverage includes travel insurance with cost details; additional_services includes enhancement services with costs; and total_budget includes a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all items are fully specified according to the required format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four components: (1) Health coverage under the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' with both physical and mental coverage. From the ground-truth ratings, the LifeFirst Standard Plan has a physical health rating of 9 and a mental health rating of 4. (2) Property coverage matches 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage', which has a rating of 9. (3) Travel coverage includes features identical to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' in the travel insurance category, which has a rating of 9. (4) Additional services include 'concierge services' (which directly maps to the travel enhancement service 'Concierge Services' rated 1) and 'professional liability' (which corresponds to the essential 'Professional liability compliance' requirement but not directly listed as a standalone item, so not rated separately). Therefore, the mapped ratings are: LifeFirst Standard Plan (Health - physical: 9, mental: 4), LifeFirst Standard Coverage (Property: 9), LifeFirst Standard Plan (Travel: 9), and Concierge Services (1).
